tagline: You can now configure Databricks workspaces to support ISMAP, the Japanese government certification initiative for cloud services.
what_it_does: You can now configure Databricks workspaces to support ISMAP, the Japanese government certification initiative for cloud services. This page describes ISMAP compliance controls in Databricks. ISMAP overview ISMAP is a Japanese government initiative that certifies cloud service providers for handling government data.
why_it_matters: You can now configure Databricks workspaces to support ISMAP, the Japanese government certification initiative for cloud services.
key_takeaway: You can now configure Databricks workspaces to support ISMAP, the Japanese government certification initiative for cloud services.
